message:
fix(core,crypto,mesh,store): correct resource URI reporting, remove broken const fn, harden share validation, preserve inflight peers during GC

Four targeted bug fixes plus cosmetic line-length reformatting:

- fcp-core/capability.rs: check_resource_constraints() now reports the
  *specific* disallowed URI in the error message instead of always
  reporting the first URI. Rewrites Iterator::all() to a for-loop to
  capture the actual violating resource.

- fcp-core/protocol.rs: remove duplicate `impl CurrencyCost` block
  with a `const fn usd()` that could never work (used String::new() in
  const context). Keeps only the correct `usd_cents()` constructor.

- fcp-crypto/shamir.rs: ShamirShare::from_bytes() now rejects
  single-byte input (bytes.len() <= 1) as empty, since byte 0 is the
  share index and at least 1 byte of actual share data is required.

- fcp-mesh/admission.rs: gc_stale_peers() now preserves peers with
  active inflight decodes even when their window timestamp is stale,
  preventing premature garbage collection of peers mid-decode.

- Cosmetic: long-line reformatting in degraded.rs, gossip.rs,
  symbol_request.rs, repair.rs. Manual Default impl for StoreLogData
  in coverage.rs for compatibility.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
